exercises.code:
from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart
from email.mime.text import MIMEText
from email.mime.base import MIMEBase
from email import encoders
msg = MIMEMultipart("mixed")
msg.attach(MIMEText("body", "plain", "utf-8"))
part = MIMEBase("application", "octet-stream")
part.set_payload(b"x")
encoders.encode_base64(part)
part.add_header("Content-Disposition", "attachment", filename="a.bin")
msg.attach(part)
print(any(p.get_content_disposition() == "attachment" for p in msg.iter_attachments()) if hasattr(msg, "iter_attachments") else True)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Del paquete S22-T1-A-E2: sigo hints/starter; desconfío de atajos fuera del contrato.

exercises.code: from email.mime.multipart import MIMEMultipart from email.mime.text import MIMEText root = MIMEMultipart("mixed") alt = MIMEMultipart("alternative") alt.attach(MIMEText("t", "plain", "utf-8")) alt.attach(MIMEText("h", "html", "utf-8")) root.attach(alt) # count all MIME parts including containers def count_parts(m): n = 1 if m.is_multipart(): for p in m.get_payload(): n += count_parts(p) return n print(count_parts(root))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Contrato I/O de S22-T1-A-E3 — solo fixtures sintéticos del packet.

exercises.code:
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
outs = []
for exp in (now - timedelta(minutes=1), now + timedelta(hours=1)):
    outs.append("refresh" if exp < now else "valid")
print(outs[0], "|", outs[1])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Implementación del contrato S22-T2-A-E3 desde instruction/starter del paquete (skeptic: no asumo extras).

exercises.code:
import re
pat = r"^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$"
outs = []
for e in ("ana@example.pe", "bad"):
    outs.append(f"{e} {bool(re.match(pat, e))}")
print(outs[0], "|", outs[1])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Implementación del contrato S22-T3-A-E1 desde instruction/starter del paquete (skeptic: no asumo extras).

exercises.code:
a, b = "ana.rojas@example.pe", "ana.rojas@example.com"
n = 0
for x, y in zip(a, b):
    if x != y:
        break
    n += 1
score = n / max(len(a), len(b))
print(round(score, 2), "match_no_es_fraude")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Contrato I/O de S22-T3-A-E3 — solo fixtures sintéticos del packet.

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Gate S22: drafts/.eml sandbox + aprobación humana, sin SMTP real.
Score alto de similitud es evidencia débil a revisar, no fraude.
Least privilege: solo scopes mínimos (p. ej. draft).
Idempotency key reutiliza el mismo draft_id si existe.
Score 0.92 → revisión de destinatario, no fraude automático.
